word: G2866 - κομψότερον - kompsóteron - komp-sot'-er-on - + began to amend

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: + began to amend
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Neuter comparative of a derivative of the base of G2865 (meaning properly well dressed, that is, nice); figuratively convalescent: - + began to amend.
